title: Diamonds
why_this_song: Diamonds by Rihanna (2012) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 27 times; first heard in: "Shine bright like a diamond"
Appears 24 times; first heard in: "Shine bright like a diamond"
Appears 23 times; first heard in: "Shine bright like a diamond"
Appears 14 times; first heard in: "You and I, you and I, we're like diamonds in the sky"
Appears 14 times; first heard in: "You and I, you and I, we're like diamonds in the sky"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: We're beautiful like diamonds in the sky
Find light in the beautiful sea, I choose to be happy
You and I, you and I, we're like diamonds in the sky

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "bright" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "bright" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "diamond" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "diamond" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Diamonds", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Diamonds", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Diamonds" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Diamonds" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Diamonds" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Diamonds", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
